title: carex asperifructus
intro: Carex asperifructus, also known as the prickly fruit sedge, is a type of perennial sedge plant native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Carex asperifructus include its potential to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Carex asperifructus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
